programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: With the arrival of their first baby, Ashley and Dillon are ready to start the next chapter of their lives; they need a home that fits their growing family, keeps Dillon close to the city, and offers space for their boat.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Yaz and Jamie take a motorcycle trip to the East Coast and instantly fall in love with Prince Edward Island; the ocean reminded Yaz of Croatia, and the couple couldn't stop dreaming about life on the island.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Shannon and Kian had a whirlwind romance and quickly settled in a small oceanfront home where they had their first daughter; when Shannon discovered she was pregnant with triplets, they realized they could no longer stay in their tiny cottage.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: After meeting in the military, Janaya and Benoit instantly connected. Janaya has always dreamed of returning to Nova Scotia, and Benoit is ready to help make that dream a reality; now they are on the hunt for a seaside home that keeps them close to family, offers a private retreat for just the two of them, and gives them the perfect place to build their life together.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Lisa and Kelly are ready for a new adventure and have set their sights on Cape Breton as the place they hope to call home. With their youngest daughter Brittney along for the ride, they are searching for the perfect forever home that lets them embrace coastal living while still giving Brittney the space to grow and thrive. Will they find a home that makes it all possible?

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Kelly grew up moving from base to base in a military family and always dreamed of a place to call home; then she met Tim, also in the military, and together they now have two beautiful children; with Tim retired, they are ready to finally put down roots, find a home, and give their kids the chance to grow up in a close-knit community while living the East Coast lifestyle they've always imagined; will they find the perfect home to make their dream a reality?

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: A couple looks for an upmarket lakehouse with a sandy beach and trampolines.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Two sisters look for a perfectly-balanced luxury lakehouse.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Jessica is an art dealer and collector, specializing in ancient and tribal artifacts. She's on the hunt for the perfect place to unwind by the water. The challenge is in finding a rustic retreat that can also house her unconventional collection.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.sub-title: Mish and Phi's Escape From the Limelight
programme.desc: A couple of actors search for a waterfront escape.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Peter and Gillian are searching for a lakefront property to call home and host charity events in; their search for a house on the lake will include tours of an upscale farmhouse and resort-like property with its own pub.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Byram and Kendra are not only husband and wife, they are also music producers; they are looking for an awesome lakefront property that they can live in, record music in and entertain clients in the music industry.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Liz and Jake both work in the tech industry; they are recently engaged and are looking for a lakefront property to host their wedding nuptials and move into; their home tours include a home with a cliffside outdoor entertainment area.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Married for 16 years with two children, Mike and Linda are looking for a lakefront property to call a family home; they are real estate investors and are looking for a property that is a good investment.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: When Kimberly and Donald got married, they became one big, blended family; now that their adult children will start having children of their own, they are searching for a big home on the lake.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Active retirees Shirley and Chris are having their adult children and grandchildren move back home; they are looking for a large lakefront home for their entire family to live together all under one roof.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Rachel and Tony are making a huge change in their lives; after getting a new lease on life, the adventurous couple decides to purchase a lakefront property that makes the two of them feel like they are always on vacation.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: James, Cristina and their children pack up and leave city life behind; they find a modern home with resort-inspired outdoor space, including a pool with a swim-up bar, as well as an elegant heritage home with a cobblestone driveway.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Real estate agent Diana and pharmaceutical industry representative Laith have traveled the world and now wish to settle down in a home on a lake; the tables are turned, as Diana will now be a buyer when she and Laith look at three unique properties.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Wealth management consultant Curtis and dance studio owner Emma wish for a serene life by the water; they find a modern retreat on a quiet canal, featuring a contemporary home with an amazing outdoor cabana space.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Rick and Kerri sell their home and smaller lake house in order to purchase a large lake house they can live in full-time; they see a modern home situated high above the trees, a 10,000 sq ft home with soaring ceilings and a more traditional home.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Husband and wife, Ken and Georgia, have worked hard their entire lives and are now looking to reap the benefits of their hard work with a lakefront dream home.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: When Kimberly and Donald got married, they became one big, blended family; now that their adult children will start having children of their own, they are searching for a big home on the lake.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Active retirees Shirley and Chris are having their adult children and grandchildren move back home; they are looking for a large lakefront home for their entire family to live together all under one roof.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Rachel and Tony are making a huge change in their lives; after getting a new lease on life, the adventurous couple decides to purchase a lakefront property that makes the two of them feel like they are always on vacation.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: James, Cristina and their children pack up and leave city life behind; they find a modern home with resort-inspired outdoor space, including a pool with a swim-up bar, as well as an elegant heritage home with a cobblestone driveway.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Real estate agent Diana and pharmaceutical industry representative Laith have traveled the world and now wish to settle down in a home on a lake; the tables are turned, as Diana will now be a buyer when she and Laith look at three unique properties.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Wealth management consultant Curtis and dance studio owner Emma wish for a serene life by the water; they find a modern retreat on a quiet canal, featuring a contemporary home with an amazing outdoor cabana space.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Rick and Kerri sell their home and smaller lake house in order to purchase a large lake house they can live in full-time; they see a modern home situated high above the trees, a 10,000 sq ft home with soaring ceilings and a more traditional home.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Husband and wife, Ken and Georgia, have worked hard their entire lives and are now looking to reap the benefits of their hard work with a lakefront dream home.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: A couple looks for an upmarket lakehouse with a sandy beach and trampolines.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Two sisters look for a perfectly-balanced luxury lakehouse.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Joni Table Talk
programme.desc: Joni and guests tackle a wide range of relevant issues, controversial subjects and hard-hitting news topics with candor and wit.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Kidd and Harry battle time and rough terrain on a backcountry supply run; Jake and his dogs track down a repeat offender; Tom gets back to business in the Yaak; Morgan checks his remote trapline for high-dollar fur.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Jake has a problem lion on his hands and soon discovers it's not alone; Tom and his brother, Jack, break down on the road to the Yaak Valley; Morgan crosses the Great Alaska Range on an emergency supply run.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Kidd and Harry set their sights on bagging a buffalo; Jake goes after a mountain lion caught too close to civilization; and Morgan fights the deadly skies of Alaska in a race to resupply his homestead.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Tom and Sean face off against a coyote threat; Eustace and Raleigh enlist some much-needed help building their lookout cabin; Jason takes one final crack at creating Ozark steel; Morgan and Margaret push deep into the backcountry.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Tom turns coyotes into cash; Eustace and Raleigh take to the forge to raise money for roofing materials; Mike scouts bears for the spring hunting season; Morgan and Margaret go fishing.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jarrett attempts to protect antique Christmas dolls from cold conditions; Chris Kikelhan moves a WWII-era amphibious vehicle.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.sub-title: A Tiger Chase and a Tight Place
programme.desc: Animal lover Jenn moves six large Bengal tigers; the delivery of mythological figures to a residential neighborhood forces Marc to gets creative.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.sub-title: A Disco Robot and Castle Hassle
programme.desc: Chris struggles to transport a fire-breathing disco robot to a music festival; Dusty encounters a demanding client with a fiberglass castle.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Dusty transports "Star Wars" movie memorabilia and a huge "Kung Fu Panda" statue; Samko arranges to haul a famous bus that has seen better days.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Todd and Tamara transport iconic clay character Gumby to a 60-year celebration; oversize vegetables get mixed while in Jenn's care.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Todd and Tamara transport a cape used by actor Val Kilmer in "Batman Forever"; a distracted Jenn struggles to safely move a 1970s recording console.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Marc is forced to call Jenn when he needs help moving a monster-sized load from the television show "The Munsters"; Todd and Tamera transport a lunar lander.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Natasha risks profit and time when signals get crossed on the dimensions of a massive radio tower; Dwight and Tyesha fear becoming the villains after superhero statues get roughed up under their watch.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: A massive animatronic creature with a one-day deadline is nightmare fuel for Molly and Russell; Tamara has dreams of a sweet payday from getting an oversized wine barrel across the country.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Natasha's big rig is in question when she takes on transporting a vintage fire truck to its original home; Molly and Russell's load that is filled with Hollywood memorabilia is a crate filled with issues.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: There's turbulence in the air when Doug attempts to haul a retired airplane fuselage with his truck; Dwight and Tyesha double book a load of ancient artifacts and a real embalming table in Austin.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Molly and Russell get boxed in by the seller of a rare arcade bowling game with his shipping demands; Tamara's haul of movie statues to Minnesota's largest candy store heats up with a large, flame-throwing side load.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Dwight and Tyesha tangle with an animatronic T. rex and chop it down to size; Doug bites off more than he can chew when moving a massive backyard pirate ship playhouse.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Natasha is amused by her classic bumper car haul; Tamara's mini-golf run turns south quickly when the 12 piece pick up turns into a 100 item load.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Molly and Russell attempt to haul an iconic picture car for a film premiere; Doug learns that a water park's lazy river is a bit of a misnomer, especially when it comes to moving one.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.sub-title: Here's the Throne, Here's the Steeple
programme.desc: A giant church steeple makes Natasha question her faith in a forklift when she's the lone soul to complete the task of loading it; winter comes for Dwight and Tyesha with a royal run composed of a handcrafted throne and a giant king cake.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: A load of vintage ski gondolas takes Molly and Russell from the mountains of Vermont to the Colorado Rockies on a run that is somehow only an uphill climb; Doug is tasked with delivering a unique cabin to one of the iconic Jellystone Parks.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Natasha heads to the high desert for a showdown when she spearheads the transport of a roller derby track; Molly and Russ get an un-relaxing spa day as they move the contents of a salon across a small Florida town.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: While hauling a flock of live ducks and chickens, Dwight and Tyesha learn why farm animals don't always make good road companions; Although Tamara's feathered friends come in the form of swan-shaped paddle boats, she too faces an unruly load.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: The tag team of Dwight and Tyesha ship a wrestling ring with a tight deadline, which puts them against the ropes; Molly & Russell's delivery of a rare blue-eyed baby camel threatens to be the straw that breaks their relationship.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Natasha meets her match during a quest to deliver a massive assortment of arcade games to an anime convention; Doug shows off his trucking skills while transporting a ninja training course, though he runs into more obstacles than he delivers.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: It's sink or swim for Natasha as she tries to deliver two ultra-rare amphibious cars to the swamps of Louisiana.

programme.title: Iconic Silver Set
programme.desc: Secure a complete 2025 Set of the iconic Morgan and Peace Silver Dollars, struck from .999 pure silver; this set contains 2 of each coin in Mint State, Proof, and Reverse Proof 70 condition with each mintage among the lowest of the modern series.

programme.title: Iconic Silver Set
programme.desc: Secure a complete 2025 Set of the iconic Morgan and Peace Silver Dollars, struck from .999 pure silver; this set contains 2 of each coin in Mint State, Proof, and Reverse Proof 70 condition with each mintage among the lowest of the modern series.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Jake hunts a lion caught stalking a school bus stop; Tom sets out to end his trapping season on a high note; Eustace and Raleigh struggle to put a roof on their outpost cabin; Morgan and Margaret prepare their horses for a critical supply run.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Tom builds an authentic Native American bull boat; Jake goes back on the hunt for the bus stop bandit; Morgan struggles to haul a ton of greenhouse supplies; Eustace and Raleigh tackle a rush order for lumber.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: As winter descends in the mountains, Jake's first lion hunt ends in a near-deadly dust up; Tom and Nancy face a surge in the local coyote population; Jason comes face to face with a marauding black bear; Mike fights predators on land and sea.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Eustace and Raleigh try to restore an antique buzz saw; Tom takes on a massive new dugout canoe project; Jake's quest for winter meat takes him on a dangerous high-altitude hunt; Kidd and Harry race against a winter storm to round up rogue cattle.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Tom and Sean search for better trapping grounds; Jake seeks revenge on the lion that injured his hound; Eustace and Raleigh struggle to fix a storm-damaged bridge.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Jason's bladesmithing business suffers a critical setback when his hand is badly cut on the job; Jake's latest lion hunt turns into a rescue mission; Kidd and Harry break a colt; Josh scavenges a wolf-killed bison.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Mike's scouting trip for bears turns into an alpine goat hunt; Jake brings in the big dogs to settle an old score with a problem lion; Tom and Sean check beaver sets to see if their new trapping grounds will pay off.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
